findings.title: Workflow grants broad write permissions
findings.description: The workflow uses permissions: write-all instead of least-privilege scopes.
findings.impact: A compromised step can modify code, releases, or deployment artifacts.
findings.remediation: Set permissions at workflow and job level and grant only required scopes.

findings.title: Third-party action pinned by tag
findings.description: An external action is referenced by a mutable tag rather than a commit SHA.
findings.remediation: Pin third-party actions to a full-length commit SHA.

findings.title: No manual approval before production deploy
findings.description: Production deployments do not require a protected environment or reviewer.
findings.impact: Risky changes can reach production without human review.
findings.remediation: Require a protected environment with required reviewers for production.
